name: 📚 Curriculum Issue

labels: curriculum, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Issue Type
- [ ] Incorrect phoneme/grapheme pairing
- [ ] Wrong word in level (not decodable at that phase)
- [ ] Distractor letters too easy / too hard
- [ ] Level ordering doesn't match Little Wandle progression
- [ ] Missing tricky word
- [ ] Incorrect tricky word set
- [ ] Typo in word list
- [ ] Phase assignment incorrect
- [ ] Other:
